full_text:
Lady Chen
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Chen. Wife of Liu Biao and mother of Liu Qi. Lady Chen may not have existed in history. Lady Chen was affiliated with Liu Biao.
